new_terms.context: Nvidia's next-generation Blackwell-based platform mentioned alongside NVL72.
The latest generation of Nvidia's network interface cards used for backend networking.
The high-bandwidth network used for GPU-to-GPU communication in AI clusters.
The network used for external connectivity and management in data centers.
Custom data processing units developed by hyperscalers to replace standard Bluefield chips.
The physical size, shape, and layout of hardware modules or components.
Amazon's specific custom networking hardware configuration for its Nitro system.
